content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

November 15, 2005

Randy J. Risner
Bush, Ackley, Milich, Hallinan
& Risner
Attorneys At Law
P.O. Box 486
Oakdale, CA 95361

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-05-195

Dear Mr. Risner:

Pursuant to my letter of November 2, 2005, attached, your request for advice received by this office on September 16, 2005, on behalf of Mayor Alvarez, is withdrawn. As a result, this matter is closed and no advice will be forthcoming.

If you have any other questions regarding this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: C. Scott Tocher
Senior Counsel, Legal Division

CST:rd
I:\AdviceLtrs\05-195

embedding.qa_text: The letter is from the Fair Political Practices Commission (FPPC) to Randy J. Risner, an attorney at Bush, Ackley, Milich, Hallinan & Risner. The FPPC informs Risner that their request for advice received on behalf of Mayor Alvarez has been deemed withdrawn and that no further advice will be forthcoming. Risner is advised to contact the FPPC at (916) 322-5660 if he has any other questions regarding this matter. The letter is signed by Luisa Menchaca, General Counsel, and dated November 15, 2005. It is signed off by C. Scott Tocher, Senior Counsel, Legal Division.
